description: Style NoteTake a refined approach to workwear bags with bulchee's Spring '12 line. The line has minimal hardware and are delectably hued (and are created from handpicked materials) so you'll want more than just one. Guaranteed to leave you "bag-struck", punctuate your everyday ensemble with this uber cool bag.Product DetailsTextured green upper with two handlesHas a ruched pocket on the front with two straps over it; straps have a twist and turn lock closureOne main zipped compartment with a zipped separator, two pouches and a zipped pocketHas one zipped pocket at the backMaterial and Care LeatheretteWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not expose to detergents, alocohol or petroleumSizeHeight: 33 cmWidth: 38 cmDepth: 15 cm
